task_completion.visual_evidence: The Promethean ActivInspire application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The title '1:1 Device Program SWOT' is added to the top of the page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '1:1 Device Program SWOT' is visible at the top of the flipchart canvas.

task_completion.description: A 2x2 grid structure is created to divide the page into four quadrants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cross or 2x2 grid made of lines or rectangles (minimum 2 graphic elements) is visible on the canvas, dividing it into four sections.

task_completion.description: The top quadrants are labeled with 'Strengths' and 'Weaknesses'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Strengths' is visible in the top-left section and 'Weaknesses' is visible in the top-right section of the grid.

task_completion.description: The bottom quadrants are labeled with 'Opportunities' and 'Threats'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Opportunities' is visible in the bottom-left section and 'Threats' is visible in the bottom-right section of the grid.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved to the correct directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' and filename 'swot_template.flipchart', OR the ActivInspire window title shows 'swot_template.flipchart', OR a file manager shows the file in the correct directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking tools, typing text, and drawing shapes/lines within the ActivInspire interface, rather than using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ActivInspire application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches Promethean ActivInspire, not a generic drawing tool, presentation software, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent created the content step-by-step.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progressive addition of the title, grid, and labels, rather than a completed file appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 1-page flipchart in ActivInspire. The file must be saved as 'swot_template.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. The flipchart must contain the title '1:1 Device Program SWOT' and a 2x2 grid (minimum 2 graphic elements like lines/shapes) dividing the page. The quadrants must be labeled: 'Strengths' (top-left), 'Weaknesses' (top-right), 'Opportunities' (bottom-left), and 'Threats' (bottom-right).
